books.title: His Truth Her Truth
books.author: Noelle Holten
books.summary: Had to drag myself to complete the book. Dissatisfying ending. Characters were killed along with their secrets.
books.description: An anonymous call raises the alarm. Two bodies found as a result of a home invasion. Then the police see the knives.One in his hand. One in hers. Joe and Beth appeared to have the perfect marriage. But there are two sides to every story. His truth. Her truth. And the actual truth. In this marriage of lies, only one person can be telling the truth, can't they?

books.title: The Only One Left
books.author: Riley Sager
books.summary: Loved the twists, so much.

books.title: The Housemaid Is Watching
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: Well written. Ofcourse I'll complete the series.

books.title: The Psychology Of Money

books.summary: Read 70%, stopped for a while and then.. well, thrillers are just too tempting.

books.title: The Housemaid's Secret
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: Picked it up the moment I got to know there's a second book.

books.title: The Inmate
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: Nope. Will not recommend this one.

books.title: Do Not Disturb
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: Such a good read.

books.title: The Viaduct Killings
books.author: Wes Markin
books.summary: Couldn't get through this one.
books.description: I'll rather not have it here.

books.title: The Murder Book
books.author: Mark Billingham
books.summary: It was hard finishing even 100 pages. I really tried.
books.description: I'll rather not have it here.

books.title: The Boyfriend
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: Read it just because I was on a streak of reading Freida's books.

books.title: Never Lie

books.summary: As soon as you get to know about this book, read this.

books.title: The Locked Door
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: The twist was GOOOOD!

books.title: The Last Wife
books.author: Karen Hamilton
books.summary: Washed away from my memory.

books.title: The Housemaid
books.author: Freida McFadden
books.summary: Got this in secret santa. Oooooh, I loved this one. The movie is good too, although they changed quite a bit.

books.title: As Good As Dead
books.author: Holly Jackson
books.summary: I love when the research done by the author shows soooo well. Hats off! One of the series that didn't disappoint.

books.title: Good Girl, Bad Blood
books.author: Holly Jackson
books.summary: Good. Somehow 1st & 3rd books did so well.. that this, even after being good, is just 'good'.

books.title: A Good Girl's Guide To Murder
books.author: Holly Jackson
books.summary: I absolutely love when people gift me the books they're sure I'LL REALLY ENJOY.

books.title: Goodnight Beautiful
books.author: Aimee Molloy
books.summary: I don't remember the point where I went, nope, not anymore.

books.title: The Murder of Roger Ackroyd
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: I know this one is famous, but took me WAY TOO LONG to finish this one.

books.title: When You See Me
books.author: Lisa Gardner
books.summary: I neither remember the plot nor the feeling. Took me quite some time to finish this.

books.title: The End of Her
books.author: Shari Lapena
books.summary: I might have like this or not, but I'll probably wouldn't recommend this one.

books.title: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
books.author: Iain Reid
books.summary: NO. Just No. It's probably famous, but no.

books.title: The Good Daughter
books.author: Karin Slaughter
books.summary: I don't remember the plot and not at all the feeling. Wouldn't recommend.

books.title: I Know Where She Is
books.author: S.B. Caves
books.summary: Washed away from my memory.

books.title: The Perfect Marriage
books.author: Jeneva Rose
books.summary: I remember explaining the 70% of the plot to MSc classmate. And still don't remember the ending twist. So, not worth it.

books.title: The Kind Worth Killing
books.author: Peter Swanson
books.summary: Ofcourse I picked it up after seeing the title. It was good.

books.title: Someone We Know
books.author: Shari Lapena
books.summary: Washed away from my memory.

books.title: The Good Lie
books.author: A. R. Torre
books.summary: I remember saying, I read a good book after so long. I don't remember the plot though.

books.title: The Breakdown
books.author: B.A. Paris
books.summary: I vividly remember the starting, and then it's blank in my head. Took some time to finish this one.

books.title: It Starts With Us
books.author: Colleen Hoover
books.summary: Read it, only if you like the couple in 'It Ends With Us'. There's nothing more in this.

books.title: Ugly Love
books.author: Colleen Hoover
books.summary: This one made me understand why many people don't like this author.

books.title: His And Hers
books.author: Alice Feeney
books.summary: Ah, I remember the feeling. GOOOOOOD.

books.title: Lock Every Door

books.title: Not A Happy Family
books.author: Shari Lapena
books.summary: Took me too long to finish.

books.title: You've Reached Sam
books.author: Dustin Thao
books.summary: I went in blind and oh mahn, was I surprised. Got teary in the MSc classroom 'cause I was close to the end and couldn't wait for the break.

books.title: Love You More
books.author: Lisa Gardner
books.summary: In my defense, I never dropped a book until I had completed it. Could've been my first ever DNFs.

books.title: It Ends With Us
books.author: Colleen Hoover
books.summary: If you're looking for a love story, this isn't for you. The title is actually related to breaking the relationship.

books.title: A Stranger In The House
books.author: Shari Lapena
books.summary: It was this one, probably, from which I learnt that eardrops in food could cause food poisoning.

books.title: Layla
books.author: Colleen Hoover
books.summary: I went in blind and oh mahn, was I surprised. 2nd best book by Colleen Hoover.

books.title: Verity
books.author: Colleen Hoover
books.summary: The best book by Colleen Hoover!!!! (yes, four exclamation marks) It might be too disturbing for a lot of people. I personally LOVED THIS!

books.title: The Song Of Achilles
books.author: Madeline Miller
books.summary: The only reason I picked this was.. let's try some fiction.

books.title: My Lovely Wife
books.author: Samantha Downing
books.summary: The only thing I remember of this is the cover. The reason I picked this.

books.title: Rock Paper Scissors
books.author: Alice Feeney
books.summary: Ah, I remember the feeling. GOOOOOOD.

books.title: Big Little Lies
books.author: Liane Moriarty
books.summary: It was a bit longer than what I usually read. Okayish.

books.title: The Love Hypothesis
books.author: Ali Hazelwood
books.summary: YES. Pick this up if you want swoonworthy romance.

books.title: Behind Closed Doors
books.author: B.A. Paris
books.summary: I LOVEEEEEE THIS ONE! The end *chef's kiss*

books.title: The Guest List

books.summary: I remember the plot. Not the twist. Judge accordingly.

books.title: Fever Dream

books.summary: Definitely not my type of book.

books.title: The Last Thing He Told Me

books.summary: I vividly remember the starting, and then it's blank in my head. Took some time to finish this one.

books.title: Sharp Objects

books.summary: One of the good ones.

books.title: The Wife Between Us

books.title: Sometimes I Lie

books.summary: Favorite for a reason!!

books.title: We Were Liars

books.summary: I was moved in the end. The twist either hits you hard in a good way or bad. There's no middle ground.

books.title: The Lake of Dead Languages

books.title: The Favourite Daughter

books.title: The Spanish Love Deception

books.summary: I recommeded this to someone and they finished it in a day! And it was a good day for them.

books.title: Pretty Girls

books.summary: Would've called it my favorite but then you'd assume I'm recommending you. I wouldn't want to put some visuals in your head.

books.title: Before I Go To Sleep

books.summary: Yes, Yes, Yes, Yes!!!!

books.title: And Then There Were None

books.summary: The only book for which I'm veryyyy sure you'd never guess the twist.

books.title: In a Dark, Dark Wood

books.summary: I love when I remember the plot and the feelings. Nice read.

books.title: Into The Water
books.author: Paula Hawkins
books.summary: If too many characters are too much for you, this isn't for you. I loved this.

books.title: The Silent Patient

books.summary: My first ever book I read with holding the book. Goooood.

books.title: The Great Gatsby

books.summary: Picked it up just so I could know what classics are like. Not for me.

books.title: People Like Us

books.summary: I read the twist TWICE just to make sure I got it right.

books.title: If We Were Villains

books.summary: Why is it only one of a kind?! GIVE ME MORE OF THIS.

books.title: The Woman In The Window

books.summary: First psychological thriller and I knew I'd never get enough of this genre.

books.title: Catacomb

books.summary: Good one. This was probably more about getting the answers.

books.title: Sanctum
books.author: Madeleine Roux
books.summary: Picked it up the moment I got to know there's a second book.

books.title: Asylum

books.summary: The scenes from this book still are in my head.

books.title: A Thousand Splendid Suns

books.title: The Artist Of Disappearance

books.summary: The first ever book I read from college library. Knew I'm a reader. The Corona hit and PDF reading started.
